results.title: Trump Wants Pakistan In Abraham Accords, Islamabad Rejects Israel Normalisation Plan
results.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is attempting to revive and expand the Abraham Accords as part of a broader West Asia strategy, but Pakistan has firmly rejected joining any agreement involving formal ties with Israel. Islamabad reiterated that it cannot recognise Israel until a Palestinian state is established. Trump’s proposal comes amid the ongoing Gaza war, rising tensions with Iran and shifting regional alliances. While countries like the UAE and Bahrain have already deepened ties with Israel under the Abraham Accords, Saudi Arabia has slowed normalisation talks following the Gaza conflict. The latest push highlights growing geopolitical divisions across the Muslim world over Israel and Palestine.
